title: Translations for Patbox's Mods
description: Standalone, updated translations for all of Patbox's mods. Works as Data pack and resource pack
body:
Standalone, updated translations for all of actively supported Patbox's mods. It works as both datapack for mods that use server translations api and/or a resource pack that works for all the mods.

If you want to help, feel free to just start translating on Crowdin: [https://crowdin.com/project/patbox-mods](https://crowdin.com/project/patbox-mods).
If your language is missing, please write a message there or on my discord!

To add this to your server resource pack, see [https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-custom-assets/](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-custom-assets/)
